Alloy Magazine.notes: Bonus reload speed while mag is empty (last round in mag fires faster). State-based — active whenever mag hits 0.

activation.trigger: Damage with all 3 weapons in sequence

Bait and Switch.notes: 30% damage boost. Must deal damage with all 3 weapons within ~7s window. Chained sequence resets the 11s duration.

Bipod.notes: Fires 2 projectiles per shot. Doubles ammo consumption. +5 Blast Radius, -20 Velocity. Always active — no trigger.

Blast Distributor.notes: Explosion damage stacks; each explosion in chain extends the buff window. Damages stack multiplicatively.

Blunt Execution Rounds.notes: After melee kill: next shot deals significantly increased damage. +40 Handling on melee kill.

Bonuses are doubled to +10 ↑+11 Aim Assi.notes: No Clarity match — dataset description used

Cascade Point.notes: Two independent triggers. Reduces Firing Delay on ready.

Charged Bolts.notes: No Clarity match — dataset description used

Compulsive Reloader.notes: +50 Reload Speed while magazine is above 50% capacity. State-based — deactivates when mag drops below threshold.

Desperate Measures x3 | 30% increased da.notes: No Clarity match — dataset description used

Eddy Current.notes: +55 Reload Speed + 30 Handling after sprinting for 1.5s. Deactivates on sprint stop.

Elemental Capacitor.notes: Passive stat boost based on equipped subclass element. Solar: +10 Reload Speed. Arc: +10 Handling. Void: +10 Stability. Stasis: +10 Recoil. Strand: +10 Charge Rate/Draw Time.

Elemental Honing.notes: Dealing elemental damage (matching subclass) procs buff. +30 Reload Speed for 8s.

Envious Arsenal.notes: Dealing damage with both other weapon slots overflows this weapon's mag (up to 2x capacity). Similar chain to Bait and Switch but for ammo not damage.

Explosive Bolts.notes: No Clarity match — dataset description used

Eye of the Storm.notes: +30 Handling + improved accuracy cone when player shields are low. State-based — activates once below ~50% shields.

Firing Line.notes: 20% increased Precision Damage only (not body shots). Requires 2 allies within 15m.

Frenzy.notes: Refreshes on damage dealt/received. Works while stowed.

Keep Away.notes: +10 Range + 30 Reload Speed when no enemies within 15m. 1.5s linger after enemy enters range.

Kickstart.notes: Sliding after a sprint grants +40 Reload Speed + 40 Handling for one magazine.

Kill Clip.notes: Reload must complete within 3.6s of kill. Stow cancels buff.

Killing Tally.notes: PvE: 10/20/30% per stack. Passively grants +10 Mag. Stow/reload clears stacks.

Kinetic.notes: No Clarity match — dataset description used

Lightweight Frame.notes: No Clarity match — dataset description used

Loose Change.notes: Applying an elemental debuff (slow, jolt, scorch, etc.) procs +50 Reload Speed + 20 Aim Assist for 5s.

Moving Target.notes: +10 Aim Assist + increased movement speed while ADS. State-based — always on when condition met.

No Distractions.notes: +20 Aim Assist after 0.9s of ADS without firing. Reduces flinch while scoped.

One For All.notes: Must tag 3 distinct enemies. x1.35 for 10.5s.

Paracausal Fluid x2 | +? Handling.notes: No Clarity match — dataset description used

Perpetual Motion.notes: Stacks x1/x2: +10/+20 Stability, +10/+20 Handling, +10/+20 Reload Speed. Note: values shown are x2 (max stack).

Rewind Rounds.notes: When magazine is depleted, it is instantly refilled from reserves (no reload animation). Tracks hits during the magazine.

Ricochet Rounds.notes: Passive intrinsic perk. Rounds richocet off hard surfaces. +5 Range, +10 Stability (confirmed Clarity).

Target Lock.notes: Ramps from +18.82% to +45% damage with successive hits on same target. Missing a shot deactivates the buff. Enhanced: higher ramp rate.

Threat Remover.notes: +60 Reload Speed after landing 10+ pellets from a single burst/spread. Shotgun-focused.

Trench Barrel.notes: 50% damage + 35 Reload Speed + 35 Handling for next 3 shots within 5s. Melee must connect.

Withering Gaze.notes: After 1.4s ADS without shooting, the target is debuffed (weaker). Buff lingers 5s after breaking ADS.
